name: Python Toolchain
description: Lint, type-check, test, and format Python code using ruff + mypy + pytest + black.
instructions: Use py_ruff for fast lint + style checks (it replaces flake8/isort/pyupgrade). Use py_mypy for static type errors. Scope py_pytest with a path or `-k expr` filter when iterating. Use py_black_check to verify formatting without applying changes.

tools.name: py_ruff
tools.description: Run `ruff check` against the given path (default .) for lint + style issues.

tools.name: py_mypy
tools.description: Run mypy static type checker against the given path (default .).

tools.name: py_pytest
tools.description: Run pytest with an optional path or -k filter. Example target: tests/test_user.py::test_login

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: File, directory, or -k expression; empty runs full suite

tools.name: py_black_check
tools.description: Check Black formatting without applying changes.
